body:
PRODUCT FIX COMPLETE

Both tasks done:

1. multi_provider → GeneralAvailability (commercial.rs:156-160)
   - Before: EntitlementGated + DeploymentTier required
   - After: GeneralAvailability, no entitlement needed
   - Solo devs can now add providers without any license

2. Orchestrator 503 message improved (was already updated by linter before context reset)
   - Message: 'No LLM provider configured. Add one via POST /v1/providers/connections, or set CAIRN_BRAIN_URL / OPENROUTER_API_KEY / OLLAMA_HOST.'

Verification:
  cargo test -p cairn-domain → 284/284 passed (0 failed)
  cargo check -p cairn-app → Finished (warnings only, no errors)

Ready for next assignment.
